sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_simple (v Variant(UInt64, String)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT v, variantElement(v, 'UInt64') AS uint_value, variantElement(v, 'String') AS string_value FROM test_simple;
UPDATE test_simple SET v = 200 WHERE variantElement(v, 'UInt64') IS NOT NULL;
SELECT variantElement(v, 'String', 'default') AS extracted_string FROM test_simple;
